business.title: VodafoneThree launches new 5G+ Local Slicing, Network Boost services
business.description: VodafoneThree's business division has launched a new 5G+ Local Slicing service for enterprise customers, becoming the first UK mobile network operator to offer commercial 5G network slicing. The 5G+ Local Slicing service operates over the group's 5G Standalone network, delivering guaranteed performance over a defined site or local area up to 5 sq km in size. ai.title: AI Surveillance to Transform Uttar Pradesh Exams
ai.description: The Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission is implementing AI-based surveillance to combat exam malpractices, ensuring transparency and fairness. The initiative involves a tech-driven framework and real-time monitoring through AI-enabled cameras, marking a significant shift towards eradicating irregularities and restoring candidate confidence in recruitment processes.
